(;B[aq]TR[ar]TR[br]SQ[bq]SQ[cq]SQ[cr]CR[dr]CR[dq]LB[ep:A]LB[do:B]C[Playing here is worth about 7 points over playing away in an empty corner. The stones marked with a triangle are dead.
